schema.description: Describes the output format when transforming from one file format to another

delimiter.description: Field delimiter for delimited output formats

hasHeader.description: Whether to write a header row

items.description: Maps a source field to a target field in the output spec

sourceField.description: Name of the field in the input spec

targetField.description: Name of the field in the output spec

transformation.description: Optional SpEL expression to transform the value

items.title: FieldMapping

schema.title: OutputSpec
